label: sarima.S0_baseline
notes: Baseline: ARMA(1,1) plus 3 daily + 2 weekly harmonics. Smallest reasonable Fourier-ARIMA.

label: sarima.S1_more_arma
notes: Increase ARMA order to (2,0,2) following PACF spikes at lags 1-2.

label: sarima.S2_more_daily
notes: Add one more daily Fourier pair (K=4): the morning ramp around 07:00 and the late-night trough are sharp and warrant a higher harmonic.

label: sarima.S3_full
notes: Final selected configuration: ARMA(2,2) + 4 daily + 3 weekly harmonics. Adds one more weekly Fourier pair to better capture weekday vs weekend amplitude differences observed in EDA.

label: lstm.L0_baseline
notes: Baseline: half-day context (72 steps), 1 layer, 32 hidden. Cheapest sensible LSTM.

label: lstm.L1_full_day
notes: Extend context to one full day (144 steps) to give the model a complete daily cycle as input.

label: lstm.L2_deeper
notes: Increase capacity: 2 layers, 48 hidden, fewer epochs. Tests whether the prior gap to SARIMA is capacity-limited.

label: lstm.L3_longer_history
notes: Doubled history (288 = two days). Tests whether the LSTM benefits from seeing the previous-day pattern explicitly.

label: cnn.C0_baseline
notes: Baseline TCN: small filters (8), 4 dilation levels (receptive field up to 30 steps). One-day input.

label: cnn.C1_wider_filters
notes: Double filters to 16. Baseline was under-parameterized; wider channels typically improve TCN expressivity.

label: cnn.C2_longer_receptive
notes: Extend receptive field with one more dilation level (16 -> RF ~62 steps) and longer input (288 = two days). Wider history without bumping capacity too far.
